memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Hmac *InstancePtr, u64 KeyAddr, u32 KeyLen, u32 KeyOut, u32 KeyOutLen)
memberdef.name: XSecure_PreProcessKey

briefdescription.para: This function pre process the key to SHA3 block length and the final key is been stored into the K0 array.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XSecure_Hmac instance
is the variable which holds the address of key for HMAC
variable holds the length of the key
is the variable which holds the output key buffer's address
is the variable which specifies the output key length based on SHA mode

listitem.para: KDF uses this path, for UDS 48 bytes key in DICE
if Key provided is of SHA 3 block length

briefdescription.para: This function performs XOR operation on provided data of SHA3 block length with constant provided on whole bytes of data and result is been updated.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer which holds data to be XORed.
with which XOR operation to be performed.
is the pointer of SHA3 block length array which is been updated with the result.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the HMAC instance.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XSecure_Hmac instance
is the pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
holds the address of HMAC key.
variable holds the length of the key.

listitem.para: XSECURE_HMAC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the data to be authenticated, which can be called repeatedly with chunks of the message to be authenticated (len bytes at data).

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XSecure_Hmac instance
holds the address of data to be updated.
variable holds the length of data.

listitem.para: XSECURE_HMAC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the final HMAC.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XSecure_Hmac instance
is the pointer of 48 bits which holds the resultant HMAC.

listitem.para: XSECURE_HMAC_INVALID_PARAM - If any input parameter is invalid.

simplesect.para: Though HMAC can be truncated, as the truncation of data may lead to security implications, this function always fills the HMAC pointer with 48 bytes of data.

listitem.para: Calculate final hash on IPAD || MSG

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the HMAC APIs.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.0 vns 05/30/22 Initial release kpt 07/24/22 Moved XSecure_HmacKat into xsecure_kat_plat.c 5.2 kpt 07/27/23 Fix security review comments dd 10/11/23 MISRA-C violation Rule 10.3 fixed dd 10/11/23 MISRA-C violation Rule 8.13 fixed 5.3 kpt 11/24/23 Replace Xil_SMemSet with Xil_SecureZeroize har 01/16/24 Corrected length of IntHash for zeroization
